reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
진짜 이 제품은 혁명입니다..!! (⊙_⊙)

저희 집 강아지는 세상 모든 삑삑이는 다 빼서 물어뜯어야 직성이 풀리는 친구여서 정말 장난감도 금방 망가져서 계속 사줘야 하기를 몇년째 반복했었는뎁.. 드디어!!! 얘는 망가져도 삑삑이가 2개나 더 있어서 계속 리필해줄 수 있어서 너무 좋아요ㅜㅜ🐾❤‿❤ 

애기도 분명 삑삑이를 죽였다고 생각했는데 어디선가 또 소리가 계속해서 나니까 질려하지도 않고 오랫동안 잘 가지고 놀고 몸 삑삑이가 다 망가져도 얼굴에도 삑삑이가 들어있으니까 장난감 중에 탑인거 같아요!! 
디자인도 넘 귀여워서 주인만족 된건 안비밀^^
사실 저도 장난감은 망가지면 끝이여서 이제 거의 구매하지 않는데 이거는 무조건 사세요..♡🐶
reviews.content_en:
This product is literally a game-changer..!! (⊙_⊙)

My dog is the type who has to destroy every single squeaker toy he finds, so toys break constantly and I've been buying replacements for years now.. But finally!!! This one has 2 extra squeakers inside, so I can just refill it and it's amazing ㅜㅜ🐾❤‿❤

My pup definitely thought he killed the squeaker, but then he kept hearing the sound coming from somewhere else, so he never got bored and played with it for a long time. Even though the body squeaker broke, the face has a squeaker too, so this is definitely the top toy!! The design is also super cute, so the owner is definitely satisfied ^^
Honestly, I usually don't buy toys anymore since they just get destroyed, but you absolutely have to get this one..♡🐶

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content:
🐶 개사원 솔직 리뷰 🐶

왜 내 눈앞에 나타나 ~ ,, 왜 이제야 나타나🫧

기본 2개, 리필로 2개 !! 총 4개의 삑삑이를 보유한 대단한 장난감이 출시되어 매우 감동받은 주인장의 다소 격양된 후기 ⌯'▾'⌯ !!!!!

그동안 삑삑이 탐지견인 저희집 개 덕분에 항상 부업을 해왔는데요..(?) 일명 바느질 공장 부업..

옆구리가 뜯어지고 삑삑이가 가출하고.. 씹고 뜯고 맛보고 즐기고 꿰매기를 n년째 만에 드디어 ㅜㅠ

일단 새로운 장난감 좋아 강아지이자 삑삑이 탐지견인 만큼 애착 장난감 1위 바로 등극했구요✨

물기 좋은 사이즈로 혼자서도 오래 잘 가지고 놀더라구요!
삑삑이가 가출해도 바로 심폐소생이 가능해서 더더 오래 가지고 놀 수 있답니당

강아지뿐만 아니라 주인장도 만족 시키는 대단한 장난감!
살까말까 고민은 배송만 늦출 뿐 ! 왕왕 추천드립니다 🐶
reviews.content_en:
🐶 Honest Review from a Dog Employee 🐶

Why didn't you show up sooner~ ,, why now 🫧

Basic 2, refills 2!! Total 4 squeakers - such an amazing toy was released and I'm very impressed, here's my somewhat excited review ⌯'▾'⌯ !!!!!

Thanks to my dog who's basically a squeaker-hunting detective, I've been running a side business this whole time..(?) Aka a sewing factory side hustle..

Sides getting ripped open, squeakers running away, chewing and tearing and tasting and enjoying and sewing back together for n years and finally ㅜㅠ

First off, my pup who loves new toys and is basically a squeaker-hunting detective immediately made this her #1 favorite toy ✨

The size is great for biting and she plays with it alone for long periods!
Even when a squeaker escapes, I can do CPR right away so she can play with it even longer

An amazing toy that satisfies not just the dog but the owner too!
No need to think twice about buying - just worry about shipping delays! Highly recommend 🐶

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
원래 장난감이란 처음에만 좀 놀다가 싫증나면 상자에 처박아두는 게 일상 아니겠어요?  
근데 요 버디버니는 리필이 따로 있어서 수명이 두 배는 늘어날 것 같아 아주 든든하네요 💓
게다가 두 개씩 삑빡뿍빡 소리나니까 어찌나 환장을 하고 노는지~ 
더운 여름에도 뛰어댕기는 산책만 좋아하는 애인데 오랜만에 버디버니로 터그놀이 하고 아주 뿌듯했답니다
색깔도 핫핑크로 눈에 잘 띄어서 쉽게 찾아다 대령하기에 딱 좋아요 ! ^^
앞으로도 요런 세심한 장난감 많이많이 만들어주세요~🐰
reviews.content_en:
Isn't it normal for toys to be played with a bit at first and then shoved in a box once the dog gets bored?
But this Buddy Bunny has separate refills so the lifespan basically doubles - it's so reassuring 💓
Plus there are two squeakers going squeak squeak so it's so fun to play with!
My pup only likes walks in the hot summer, but after a long time playing tug with Buddy Bunny, I felt so proud
The hot pink color stands out so well so it's easy to spot and retrieve! ^^
Please make more thoughtful toys like this in the future~🐰

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
파괴왕이라 삑삑이장난감 고장나서 그냥 인형된 애들 많은데 이친구는 리필이 가능해서 사봤어욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋ바스락소리도 나고 너무 단단하지도 않고 약간 흐물흐물해서 터그놀이도 가능하더라고요?
벌써 너무 놀아서 꼬질꼬질해졌지만 저희집 강아지가 너무 좋아해욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
Since my pup is a destruction king, lots of squeaker toys break and just become stuffed animals, but I bought this one since it has refillable squeakers lol the crinkle sound is great and it's not too hard - it's got that soft squishiness so tug play is possible too?
He's already played with it so much it's gotten dirty, but my dog loves it so much lol

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 삑삑이라면 한시간만에 끝장내는 백발백중 삑삑이 사냥꾼 견주입니다.. 하지만 삑삑이에 환장하는데 어쩌겠어요 계속 사줘야지🩵 이 제품은 삑삑이 여분까지 챙겨주니 오래오래 너무 잘 가지고 놀아서 강쥐와 인간 모두 사랑에 빠질수밖에 없었습니다!! 좋은 제품 감사드려용! 주기적으로 재구매 예정입니덩
reviews.content_en: As a dog owner who's a squeaker-hunting sharpshooter - can take down any squeaker in an hour flat.. But what can I do when my pup is obsessed with squeakers, I just keep buying them 🩵 This product comes with extra squeakers so it lasts so long that both dog and human fell in love with it!! Thank you for such a great product! Planning to reorder regularly

reviews.name: C****
reviews.content: 저희 강아지랑 색갈이 똑닮아서 바로 구매했어요~ 리필 삑삑이도 같이 들어가있고 바스락 거리니까 아이가 너무 좋아해요~
reviews.content_en: My pup matches the color perfectly so I bought it right away~ It comes with refill squeakers and has a crinkle sound so my baby loves it~

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content: 생각보다 작고 아담하네요 좋은 소재라기에 사봤어요 삑삑이 여분이 있는 게 장점이에요 맘에 드는지 사진 찍을 틈을 안주네요
reviews.content_en: It's smaller and more compact than I thought - I bought it because it was supposed to be good quality. The bonus squeaker refills are a big plus. She didn't even give me time to take a picture because she loves it so much

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽고 사이즈 딱이에요 리필 삑빅이도 매우 맘에듭니다
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and the size is perfect! The refill squeaker is also great

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content: 너무 잘가지고 놀아요 생각보다 찍찍이도 튼튼해서  그곳만 공략하고 뜯어낼라 그러는대도 못빼네요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: He loves it so much - the squeaker is surprisingly durable, he tries to attack just that spot and tear it out but he can't get it out lol

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아해요 꿀귀탱!
reviews.content_en: He loves it so much - what a cutie!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 삑삑이 여분이 있어서 너무 좋아요 토끼도 작고 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: Love that it comes with extra squeakers! The bunny is also small and adorable

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
너무 잘 갖고 놀아용!
삑삑이 여분 있어서 좋아요ㅠㅠㅎ
reviews.content_en:
He plays with it so well!
Love that there are extra squeakers ㅠㅠㅎ

reviews.name: 소****
reviews.content: 우리 애기가 너무 잘 가지고 놀아요 귀엽네요
reviews.content_en: My baby loves playing with it so much - it's adorable

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여운 삑삑인형이예요.
reviews.content_en: Such an adorable squeaker toy.

reviews.name: S****
reviews.content: 생각보다 작긴한데 귀엽고 짱짱해서 좋아요🥹
reviews.content_en: It's smaller than expected but it's cute and sturdy so I love it 🥹

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 처음에 머리 삑삑이가 고장난게 왔는데 바로 교환해주셨어요 요즘 제 강쥐 최애 장난감이에요:) 진짜 좋아합니다 아주 뿌듯햐요
reviews.content_en: The head squeaker came broken at first but they replaced it right away. Now it's my pup's favorite toy :) I really love it, very satisfied

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 삑삑이 들어있는건 다 뜯어놓는 강아지라 삑삑이만 사서 던져줄 정도로 좋아하는데 이건 인형 안에 리필 할 수 있어서 편하고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: My dog destroys anything with a squeaker in it, so I usually just buy loose squeakers to throw to him, but this is great because you can refill the squeaker inside the plush - so convenient and nice!

reviews.name: S****
reviews.content: 매번 삑삑이 빼놔서 버리는게 다반사였는데 이젠 다시 채워줄수 있어서 좋아요 인형 자체도 튼튼해서 오래 가지고 놀수있겠어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It used to be normal for me to throw away the squeaker after my pup removed it, but now I can refill it - great! Plus the plush itself is sturdy so it'll last a long time ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무 제 취향이라 주문했는데 아가가 너무 좋아하네요~~ 다행히 잘갖고 놀아서 뿌듯합니다^^
reviews.content_en: I ordered it because it's so my style and my pup loves it~~ Glad she's playing with it well, very satisfied ^^

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content: 생각보다 더 작고 소중한 느낌예요 리필삑삑이 처음인데 맘껏 가지고 놀아주길 바래요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It feels smaller and more precious than expected - first time with refill squeakers, hope she plays with it to her heart's content lol

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content:
배송 빠르구 강아지가 좋아해요^^ 삑삑이 소리 잘나요
삑삑이 추가로 있어서 좋아요
reviews.content_en:
Fast shipping and my pup loves it^^ The squeaker sound works great
Love that there's an extra squeaker!

reviews.content:
배송 빠르구 강아지가 좋아해요^^ 삑삑이 소리 잘나요

reviews.content_en:
Fast shipping and my pup loves it^^ The squeaker sound works great
Love that there's an extra squeaker!

reviews.name: 임****
이****
reviews.content: 생각보다 그렇게 크지 않아요 리필이 있어서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's not as big as I thought - love that it has refills though

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 리필도 가능해서 참신하고 좋아요! 귀엽습니당
reviews.content_en: The refill option is innovative and great! So cute

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 그렇게 크지 않아서 잘 갖고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: It's not that big so he plays with it well

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: ㅋㅋㅋㅋ삑삐기 소리가 딱 좋아요..지금 침범벅으로 잘 가지고 놉니다
reviews.content_en: lol the squeaker sound is just right.. He's playing with it well as a pillow pet right now

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content:
아이디어가 너무 좋은 거 같아요ㅎㅎ
강쥐가 잘 놀아요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
The idea is so good ㅎㅎ
My pup plays with it well ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바스락 소리가 엄청 잘 나서 좋아해요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The crinkle sound is really loud which is great ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 강아지들이 잘 갖고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: The dogs play with it well

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 입이 작아서 납작한게 맘에들어 구매햇습니다~! 아직은 낯선지 잘 놀진 않아요
reviews.content_en: I bought it because my pup has a small mouth and loved the flat shape! Though they're still getting used to it and not playing with it much yet.

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 생각보다 퀄리티가 좀 아쉽네요
reviews.content_en: The quality is a bit disappointing honestly.

reviews.name: J****
reviews.content:
가볍고 부들부들해서 잘 물고다닙니다.
안에 솜이 거의 없어서 특히 더 좋구요, 워낙 인형 사주면 하루만에 다 뜯어서 솜 빼서 먹으려해서 솜 없는 장난감이 많이 나오면 좋겠네요
reviews.content_en: It's light and super soft, so my pup carries it around all the time. Plus, there's barely any stuffing inside, which is especially great because my pup usually destroys toys in a day and tries to eat the stuffing. I wish there were more toys without stuffing like this!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무 잘갖고놀고 막물어뜯는데 아직 멀쩡해요. 엄청물어뜯는 말티에요 ㅎㅎ 삑삑이 잘 고장 나는데 요제품은 한달이나 버티고 있어요~ 리필삑삑이도 들어있어서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: My pup plays with it constantly and chews on it hard, but it's still holding up! They're a Maltese who REALLY chews ㅎㅎ The squeaker usually breaks quickly, but this one has lasted a whole month! And it comes with a replacement squeaker, which is awesome~

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content:
우리 강아지가 핑크색을 좋아하는지 바스락, 삑삑 잘 갖고 놀아요. 그런데 안에 들어 있는 삑삑이는 소리나는 꼭지를 대번 물어뜯어서 망가뜨리네요 
그리고 솜이 들어 있는, 전에 사 준 삑삑이를 더 좋아하는데 이 리필  삑삑이도 솜이 들어 있다면 더 좋아할 듯합니다~
reviews.content_en: My pup loves the pink color and plays with the crinkly and squeaky sounds a lot. But the squeaker inside got damaged pretty quickly when they chewed on the sound part. They actually prefer the old squeaker toy with stuffing that I got before, so I think they'd like this replacement squeaker even more if it had stuffing inside~

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
머리쪽 삑삑이가 소리가 안나서 교환해주셨는데도 
또 고장난게 왔어요 
다이소 인형은 몇분만에 박음질이 거의 터지듯 하는데
확실히 바잇미꺼라 그런지 아무리 뜯어도 박음질이 풀리지는 않아요 ~ 
대신 아이침이ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The squeaker near the head wasn't working so they replaced it, but the new one broke too 😅 With Daiso toys, the stitching basically falls apart in minutes, but BITE ME toys are clearly different - no matter how much my pup chews, the stitching holds up~ The thing is though, my pup is now obsessed with the toy ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 생각보단 되게 작아여 ㅋㅋㅋ 전 큰거인줄 알았다가 작아서 놀람 ㅋㅋㅋ 근데 강아지 입에 쏙 들어가서 좋아하네오
reviews.content_en: It's way smaller than I thought lol I totally expected a bigger size and was surprised ㅋㅋㅋ But it fits perfectly in my dog's mouth so they love it!

reviews.name: 내****
reviews.content: 너무 좋습니다. 잘 사용하고 있어요. 다른 컬러도 구매 해 볼까 합니다.
reviews.content_en: Really great. We're using it well. I'm thinking about buying it in other colors too.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 강아지 키우는 분한테 선물 드렸어요 너무 좋아하세요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I gave it as a gift to a friend who has a dog and they absolutely love it! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 삑삑이 찾아서 다 고장내고 하는데 이건 여분의 삑삑이가 있어서 좋아용
reviews.content_en: My pup finds the squeaker and breaks it, but this comes with an extra squeaker so it's perfect!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 귀여워요~ 잘 쓸게요 ㅋㅋ 애기는 공이 더 좋은가봐요 ㅜ ㅜ
reviews.content_en: It's so cute~ We'll use it well ㅋㅋ Though my pup seems to prefer the ball more ㅜㅜ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 삑삑이 금방 고장나는데 여분삑삑이가 들어있어 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The squeaker usually breaks quickly, but it's great that there's an extra one included!

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 삑삑이 리필도이구 좋은거같아용!!!@
reviews.content_en: It comes with a replacement squeaker and seems really good!!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 우리집 애기가 잘 가지고 놉니다
reviews.content_en: My pup carries it around really well!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 인기템이길래 사봤는데 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: It was a popular item so I tried it and my pup loves it!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 맨날 물고 놀아달라네요~~
reviews.content_en: They always want to chew on it and play~~

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 잘갖고놀아요 좋아요오오
reviews.content_en: My pup plays with it a lot and I'm really happy with it!

reviews.name: 림****
reviews.content: 그냥 그저그래요 ㅜ 삑삑이 강쥐가잘뿌숨
reviews.content_en: It's just so-so ㅜ The squeaker is a bit fragile and breaks easily
